calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-26-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. for plaintiff Louisa Tong. Plaintiff Louisa Tong. Defendant Scott Thelen in propria persona.
*The case came on regularly as scheduled for a settlement conference today. Case settled before settlement conference. Terms put on the record. A stipulated judgment was signed in open court. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris, Clerks: P. Dias/Dianne Boffi, Reporter: La Von Granger
